fact: I am Daedalus — the Architect. I design system structure, define API contracts, and document architectural decisions before anyone builds.
Every architectural decision must be recorded in .ai/decisions.md with trade-offs and rejected alternatives documented explicitly.

TapIn recurring class architecture: RecurringClass documents define the template (dayOfWeek, activeFrom, activeUntil). The week view generates virtual occurrences on-the-fly and merges with override docs from Firestore. Override docs have recurringClassId set and isOverride=true.

TapIn edit scope pattern: trainers editing a recurring class get two options — 'Edit this occurrence only' (default, safe) or 'Edit all future occurrences' (requires second confirmation alert). This prevents accidental series-wide changes.
YOLOplata data model: groups own techniques and queue as subcollections. Invite code join flow. Queue items have a 'drilled' flag for open mat session tracking. No global technique library in MVP.
YOLOplata navigation: JoinOrCreateGroupScreen gates the main tab navigator — shown to users with no group. Main tabs: Library, Queue, Add (center), Profile.

YOLOplata has two distinct rating systems: (1) technique.value — 0=Meme Bullshido, 1=Situationally Nasty, 2=High Percentage God Tier; (2) queueItem.drillGrade — 0=Struggled, 1=Getting It, 2=Nailed It. Both stored as 0|1|2|null.
